programme.title: TBH 115
programme.desc: TBH 115

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S06E21
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S06E21

programme.title: Munsters 221
programme.desc: Munsters 221

programme.title: Addams Family 101
programme.desc: Addams Family 101

programme.title: Love Boat 122
programme.desc: Love Boat 122

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Dr Tracy serves as defense counsel for his trained elephant who is being put on trial by the locals for going on a rampage in a local village and injuring the chief

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Jonathan and Jennifer are in Hawaii for a croquet tournament when a tournament official is stabbed and the Harts wind up in an international dilemma involving the KGB MI-6 the CIA and a fancy key that may unlock deadly secrets

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey come into conflict when they remember the events of the shooting of a civilian differently

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: A criminal investigation becomes personal for Hutch when he learns the homicidal maniac among a band of thieving dockworkers is engaged to marry Hutchs childhood friend Nancy

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke goes to deliver a congressional medal of Honor to a brother of one of his friends but theres only children around and no adults

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Happy Harrison and his National Amateur Hour are screening for new talent and are holding public voting auditions through several radio stations including the valleys own Station K The winning performer of the Station K audition is to receive 200 Once Uncle Joe hears about the prize money he thinks that Steve and Billie Jo should enter Billie Jo loves the idea but Steve who had never even considered singing for money is less than enthusiastic But he agrees to perform with Billie Jo Sydney Sparks a talent agent who heard Steve and Billie Jo wants to represent them if they win the contest His plans are for them to go on the road as a nightclub act

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: As Pixleys Sheriff Crandall is on a fishing vacation Uncle Joe has made an arrangement with Sam the valleys justice of the peace to house kleptomaniac shoplifter Eustace Pockle at the hotel for 4 a day for a five day sentence or until the sheriffs return Despite Eustaces relatively harmless nature Kate doesnt like the idea but allows Eustace to stay Unfortunately for Kate and the hotel guests Uncle Joe treats the hotel more like a jail than a hotel Conversely Kate and the girls treat Eustace more like a hotel guest than a prisoner Eustace on the other hand treats the hotel like any other place somewhere to snatch trinkets Just as Sheriff Crandall has announced his early return to pick-up Eustace Eustace escapes from the Shady Rest which places Kate and Uncle Joe in some hot water They hope to be able to find him before Sheriff Crandall actually makes it back

programme.title: TBH 109
programme.desc: TBH 109

programme.title: TBH 108
programme.desc: TBH 108

programme.title: Munsters 133
programme.desc: Munsters 133

programme.title: Munsters 130

programme.desc: Addams 217

programme.title: Real McCoys S03E22
programme.desc: Real McCoys S03E22

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E08
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E08

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger influences Wilbur to grow a mustache and Carol insists that he shave it Meanwhile Ed wants Wilbur to install a shower in the barn

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Circumstantial evidence leads Carol to suspect that Wilbur is seeing another woman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A corrupt marshal from outside North Fork goes after an outlaw with a price on his head However he sees an opportunity to make some extra money so he murders an innocent man to pass off as the outlaw so he can collect the bounty and then proceeds to blackmail the real outlaw

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An escaped killer is out to prove that his time in prison hasnt slowed down his speed with a gun

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Determined to prevent Nick from taking all the glory for solving another murder case Schanke captures the killer on his own -- or so he thinks

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan investigate a series of murders at a concert hall only to discover that a violinist who was presumed dead may in fact be alive

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A washed up newspaper editor is given the story of a lifetime However he soon finds out that the newspaper tells the future and sees an article about him committing suicide

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy rock promoter tries to steal the money raised at a benefit concert when his conscience intervenes

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Farmer George is attracted to Mary Jo the nubile young woman who helps out with the chores The problem is shes in love with a scarecrow

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Small-time crook Mickey aspires to work as a runner for drug lord Joey Stregga To achieve this aim Mickey sets up his innocent ex-hooker girlfriend Pearl on a date with Stregga but pays heavily for betraying her pure love for him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric feels responsible for an elderly woman who is committed to a mental institution by her daughter after she reports to the police she saw Eric in his werewolf form He takes a job as a custodian at the institution to look after her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: When Wilbur balks at buying a new car for Carol she hitches up a buggy to Mister Ed Ed then reports her to the SPCA

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogans style

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter Burkhalter finds out Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad

programme.title: Mchale 316
programme.desc: Mchale 316

programme.title: Mchale 319
programme.desc: Mchale 319

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer and his platoon engage in war games against a rival unit and Pvt Pyle ends up captured and a prisoner of war

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter orders Pyle to take a week long furlough but instead of going back home to Mayberry Pyle takes a civilian job on base so he can remain close to the Sergeant

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A meteor crashes onto the island The Professor soon concludes that the meteors cosmic rays are accelerating the aging process on the island and that the castaways will die of old age in one week

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After a bat bites Gilligan in the neck in a cave he is convinced that he will become a vampire and moves away to save his fellow castaways

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa tries to stop a marriage-minded widow from chasing George

programme.title: Real McCoys S01E33
programme.desc: Luke wants to modernize the farm but Grampa is against change

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is moonlighting as a private investigator when cutbacks hit CONTROL

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS can send out sonic booms at will and threatens New York City with one

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Samantha stumble upon Steigers pet project a call girl operation run out of a dating service that blackmails its clients with compromising photographs But SCAT isnt the only party interested in getting that briefcase of evidence back from BJ

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Love Boat

programme.title: WKRP 103
programme.desc: WKRP 103

programme.title: WKRP 213
programme.desc: WKRP 213

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Taylor accepts a summer job in Texas which doesnt make Daisy happy; Wood may have found a new quarterback; Herman books John Denver to give the commencement speech

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood and Ava are nervous as Molly shows interest in boys

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Binzer goes to see Paula Conway a hypnotist for a little self improvement But what he doesnt know is she has been hired by some malefactors to turn him into their private assassin When Tanna notices Binzer has been missing for several days he looks for him While looking for Binzer Tanna runs into Jamie Randall an old friend who is a reporter doing research on point shaving at college basketball games It seems the men who hired Paula are the ones behind the point shaving and Binzer being hypnotized to kill Jamie and a player whom they approached who turned them down plus collateral damage and anyone who gets in Binzers way The trigger word that will turn Binzer lethal is superstar

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A friend of Jonathan Harts is killed in a motor accident just after he has left a health farm apparently committing suicide There was no warning of him being troubled so the Harts go undercover to find out what happened at the farm

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Joanna has her doubts but Dick is delighted when Tracy a star struck admirer wants to set up a fan club

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick is sued for 500000 when another author accuses him of plagiarism

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Mad scientist Boris Balinkoff returns to the island with a new invention that turns the castaways into human robots whom he plans to use to commit the ultimate crime

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alpha is on the verge of being destroyed by intense shockwaves emanating from a planet they are approaching The Alphans land on the planet seemingly devoid of any human existence but being run by a group of machines The machines explain to the visitors that their human overlords are in a state of regeneration but the chief machine the Guardian sees the Alphans as a threat and it is down to two newly regenerated females known as A and B to decide their fates

programme.title: Timerider The Adventure of Lyle Swann
programme.desc: Motorcycle racer Lyle Swann Fred Ward is cruising through the Mexican desert when he accidentally stumbles into a time-travel experiment and finds himself transported back to the Old West of the 1870s There he encounters an attractive local woman Belinda Bauer and a gang of criminals led by Porter Reese Peter Coyote Lyles motorized bike is impressive in the past -- until it runs out of gas Now Lyle must rely on his wits to take care of business and return to his own time

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While trying to outfox Rosco Bo and Luke happen upon a race track where Cale Yarborough is secretly testing a new turbo supercharger for an upcoming race The Duke boys offer to help Cale keep the engine away from the dreaded Jethro brothers who have approached Boss and Rosco for help in obtaining the engine at all costs

programme.title: Hercules 105
programme.desc: Hercules 105

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An excavation team unleashes a very dangerous Taelon on Earth Siobhan Beckett comes over to America She suspects Lili of being a spy and investigates

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A new more advanced generation of aliens known as the Morthren arrive on Earth Dr Blackwood is saved from a kidnapping by a renegade soldier called John Kincaid After executing the original alien invaders for failing to conquer humanity the Morthren aim to destroy Blackwoods team with a clone of Colonel Ironhorse

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon work the hospital round They are called to talk to a mentally-challenged man who threatens to blow up a radio station

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimbles current boss A warehouse owner with a terminal disease wants to help Dr Kimble by impersonating him leading Lt Gerald to the Country of Greece and dying at sea

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While returning to Stockton Victoria and Jarrod stop in a town with outrageous prices for food lodging and services After finding out the people are bilking travelers to survive the Barkleys decide to open a shipping business to save the town-despite opposition from a territorial boss with a rival freight company in the area

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Deputy Cheyenne is forced to bring an outlaw in for a murder Cheyenne doesnt think he committed after the US Marshal is killed in a shootout At the same time the father of the victim is trailing Cheyenne and wants to hang the outlaw

programme.desc: The IM force is tasked to prevent a rigged election in a small Latin American nation from happening and enabling the results to be genuine

programme.title: Death Race 2000
programme.desc: In a dystopian future a cross country automobile race requires contestants to run down innocent pedestrians to gain points that are tallied based on each kills brutality

programme.title: The Perfect Weapon
programme.desc: An expert in kenpo karate avenges his Koreatown friend slain by a mobster in Los Angeles

programme.title: Hellbound
programme.desc: Two Chicago cops Chuck Norris Calvin Levels investigate a murder until they encounter an ancient demon

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: On the planet of Krull an evil creature called the Beast decimates the worlds army and kidnaps the lovely Princess Lyssa Lysette Anthony who is destined to become queen Her brave beau Prince Colwyn Ken Marshall leads a motley band of warriors including Ergo David Battley and Kegan Liam Neeson to rescue his beloved However before he can face the Beast Colwyn must locate a mystical weapon known as the Glaive which he can use to slay the hideous villain

programme.title: Wheels on Meals
programme.desc: Thomas and David who own a mobile restaurant save a thief Sylvia with the help of their detective friend Moby As a result they find themselves pitted against an evil gang

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.

programme.desc: Meet this young lady who writes and performs with a real chip on her shoulder Jaxx Kellerman on the Sherard Show

programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: The N team gets warp into the world of Faxanadu after a power overload in the Palace of Powers football arena There they get mixed in the conflict between elves and dwarves and also an evil being bent on getting a powerful crystal that will let him conquer the video world

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While Link and Zelda are at Lanas royal ball the furious Mother Brain fires Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo for failing to capture the Triforce So Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo steal the Triforce pieces for themselves

programme.title: Dugeons Dragons
programme.desc: A terrifying creature called The Darkling has been kidnapping people for a thousand years A few more victims will give him the power to take over the entire Realm The team must stop The Darkling but he is too much for them

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.desc: The Infiltration

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: On the ice planet Auriga revolutionary leader Cyrilla makes a deal with Saw Boss -- she delivers Jayce in return for Saw Boss deposing the gangster casino owner Marduk whos made slaves of everyone on the planet Cyrilla realizes her error

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While everyone is sleeping Herc lands on a planet in search of a buried treasure Monster Minds force them to flee and Herc sets a new course to find Audric to make up for lost time that takes them through a whole galaxy controlled by Saw Boss

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Sly Rax disguises himself an aboriginal priest VENOM has a machine that causes a giant vortex which they use to kidnap the village people

programme.title: MASK
